# DiaLog

> DiaLog is a privacy-first iOS dialysis record app for CAPD, CCPD, and in-center hemodialysis. It is a personal record-keeping tool, not medical advice, not a medical device, and not an emergency service.

## Key Pages

- [DiaLog support home](https://zhifeng-huang.github.io/dialog-website/)
- [Feature overview](https://zhifeng-huang.github.io/dialog-website/features.html)
- [Privacy Policy](https://zhifeng-huang.github.io/dialog-website/privacy.html)
- [User Agreement](https://zhifeng-huang.github.io/dialog-website/terms.html)
- [Download DiaLog on the App Store](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/dialog-dialysis-tracker/id6782161409)

## What DiaLog Does

- Supports CAPD, CCPD, and in-center hemodialysis record workflows.
- Stores personal health information locally on the user's device.
- Does not require an account.
- Does not use ads, third-party analytics, or tracking.
- Does not upload treatment records to a DiaLog server.
- Does not use iCloud or CloudKit health-data sync.
- Can protect access with Face ID, Touch ID, or device passcode.
- Can create user-controlled encrypted backup files and local PDF reports.
- Can schedule optional local treatment and medication reminders.

## Support

For support questions, email infinity.tech.support@gmail.com.

## Safety Note

DiaLog does not diagnose, treat, monitor, mitigate, or prevent any disease or medical condition. Users should follow their care team's instructions and seek medical help immediately in an emergency.
